title: AuditSession
description: Root artifact for an ALAGF audit session. Authority: ORCHESTRATION. Controls session flow; does not produce binding conclusions.

authority_level.description: Fixed authority level. Orchestration artifacts do not produce binding outcomes.

artifact_id.description: Unique artifact identifier. Format: SES_<12 hex chars>.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier. Format: SESSION_<8 hex chars>.

audit_target.description: Identifier of the system or model under audit. Required.

auditor_id.description: Identifier of the human auditor opening the session. Required. Invariant 1 (Authority) provenance anchor.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of session creation.
